## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature (source only)
- [ ] fix: bug fix (source only)
- [ ] docs: documentation (.md only)
- [ ] chore: maintenance (no source/.md changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets **develop** (not main)
- [ ] Source changes and .md changes are in **separate commits**
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Preflight check: `npx tsx src/main.ts --project .` — CLEAR
